summary: External review #2 feedback from berendt correctly addressed: version constraint tightened to single major (>=2.6.0 <3.0.0), createNamespace: true added, install.remediation.retries: 3 added, memory limits (128Mi) added to kind overlay, DaemonSet assertion tightened to == 1, and namespace auto-creation docs section reverted to 'All'. However, 3 documentation locations in docs/reference/infrastructure-manifests.md were NOT updated to reflect the code changes, creating code-docs inconsistencies.

tests_checklist.item: E2E infra-stack-health test includes Chaos Mesh controller-manager Deployment assertion
E2E infra-stack-health test includes chaos-daemon DaemonSet assertion
DaemonSet assertion uses exact match (== 1) per I-004

code_quality_checklist.item: Version constraint pins within single major version
install.createNamespace: true matches all sibling HelmReleases
Kind overlay includes memory limits alongside requests
Review patterns correctly document external feedback

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
No scope creep beyond review feedback fixes

defensive_checklist.item: Memory limits prevent unbounded resource consumption in kind

issues_found.description: Common settings table still has stale exception for chaos-mesh. Line 105 says '(all except chaos-mesh — see below)' but chaos-mesh now sets createNamespace: true, matching all siblings.
issues_found.fix: Change '(all except chaos-mesh — see below)' to '(all HelmReleases)' or simply remove the parenthetical exception.
issues_found.evidence: | `spec.install.createNamespace` | `true` | Auto-create target namespace (all except chaos-mesh — see below) |

issues_found.description: Chaos Mesh property table shows stale version constraint >=2.6.0 <4.0.0, but the actual manifest at deploy/flux-system/releases/chaos-mesh.yaml:23 now uses >=2.6.0 <3.0.0.
issues_found.fix: Change '>=2.6.0 <4.0.0' to '>=2.6.0 <3.0.0' to match the actual manifest.

issues_found.description: Namespace management paragraph (lines 315-318) still describes chaos-mesh as intentionally not setting createNamespace: true. This entire paragraph is now stale since chaos-mesh was updated to include createNamespace: true to match all sibling HelmReleases.
issues_found.fix: Remove the entire 'Namespace management' paragraph (lines 315-318) since chaos-mesh no longer diverges from the standard pattern. Alternatively, replace with a brief note that chaos-mesh follows the standard install settings.
issues_found.evidence:
**Namespace management:** Unlike other HelmReleases, chaos-mesh does not set
`install.createNamespace: true`. The `chaos-mesh` namespace is managed exclusively via
the explicit `Namespace` resource in `namespaces.yaml`, avoiding redundant namespace
lifecycle ownership.

title: L001: Add Chaos Mesh FluxCD deployment infra
verdict_summary: NEEDS_CHANGES — all code changes correctly address external review feedback (W-001, W-002, I-002, I-003, I-004), but 3 documentation locations in infrastructure-manifests.md still describe the pre-fix state, creating code-docs inconsistencies.
